examples: At the moment, you're only limiting the behavior of the auction house, not the consigner or the buyer.
The air transport company will collect payment on your behalf from the consigner, against delivery.
The owner or consigner shall pay the freight and average and all other lawful charges accruing on said property.
The consigner I heard turned apoplectic as there was no reserve price put on the piece.
One store calls me when a particular consigner has dropped off items.
